## Test Summary (S71-05 focus: Locale Smoke Strategy)

**Scope:** Post-prep locale smoke strategy (P0 en-US inventory verification only). Covers future S72+ execution. **No PlayMode / runtime behavior changes or tests added in S71** (unless explicit user ack + TDD per execute-plan §4 S71-05 and S71-07 Unity UI / C2 hosts inventory-only rule). All string externalization assumed complete from S71-01/02; this plan defines smoke approach.

| Story/Task | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|------------|------|-------------------------|------------------------------|
| S71-05 l10n QA plan (this) | Config/Data | None (meta/strategy doc) | Plan review + cites + strategy vs inventory (S71-01/02); sign-off before S71-06 |
| Future locale smoke (post S71; strategy only) | Integration / Manual | Headless string table load + export roundtrip (future); deterministic snapshot compare | en-US smoke: all P0 strings present in tables; no hardcodes in C2/HUD/menus (per inventory); UI text render (editor projection, no PlayMode); RTL/fallback notes (future tiers); cultural notes (future) |
| String freeze / extraction validation | Config/Data | N/A (plan) | Freeze marker in inventory; extraction plan steps cross-check vs Game-Requirements/requirements/* |
| S71-06 Closeout (related) | Integration | Full gates + smoke-sprint-71 (see stub) | Status + evidence-index links |

**Classification:** Per qa-plan skill + execute §4. L10n prep = Config/Data + future Integration (smoke only). Conservative: P0 en-US focus; defer full locales/PlayMode.
